appointmentDetails.title: Appointment Details
appointmentDetails.description: The details required to book an appointment.

timeslot.title: Selected Time Slot
timeslot.description: The time slot for the appointment.

companyInfo.title: Company Information
companyInfo.description: The company information of the customer that's booking the appointment. If the customer is new, they're later asked for their company info.

firstName.title: First Name
firstName.description: The first name of the customer that's booking the appointment. If the customer is new, they're later asked for their first name

lastName.title: Last Name
lastName.description: The last name of the customer that's booking the appointment. If the customer is new, they're later asked for their last name.

email.title: Email Address
email.description: The email address provided by the customer.

serviceAppointmentId.title: Service Appointment ID
serviceAppointmentId.description: The service appointment ID that must be provided when rescheduling or modifying an appointment.
